sections.label: Client Basics
sections.description: Core contact and identity information. Many values are pre-filled from Sales — AM confirms or supplements.

sections.label: Engagement Setup
sections.description: Scheduling, contract terms, and communication preferences. AM fills most of these from the Sales handoff.

sections.label: Service Delivery
sections.description: Details needed to kick off and deliver contracted services.

sections.label: Client Assets & Access
sections.description: Assets and credentials that only the client can provide. Default assignee is 'Send to Client' for all fields here.

sections.label: AM Internal Notes
sections.description: Internal-only context for the account team. Not visible to the client.

fields.label: Primary Contact Name
fields.description: The main point of contact AM will work with day-to-day.

fields.label: Industry
fields.description: Industry category from the Sales intake.

fields.label: Assigned Account Manager
fields.description: The AM responsible for this client relationship.

fields.label: Kickoff Call Date
fields.description: Scheduled date for the onboarding kickoff call.

fields.label: Target Service Start Date
fields.description: When delivery is expected to begin.

fields.label: Preferred Contact Method
fields.description: How the client prefers to communicate. AM can confirm from Sales notes or send to client.

fields.label: Internal Priority
fields.description: AM-assigned priority for internal resource planning.

fields.label: Access Credentials Received
fields.description: Check once the client has provided login access to all required platforms.

fields.label: Target Audience Description
fields.placeholder: Describe the ideal customer: demographics, geography, services sought…
fields.description: Who is the ideal customer? Only the client can fully answer this — send to client unless AM knows from discovery.

fields.label: Unique Selling Points / Differentiators
fields.placeholder: What sets this business apart? Awards, certifications, guarantees, specialties…
fields.description: What makes the client stand out from competitors. Typically requires client input.

fields.label: Top Competitors
fields.description: Direct local competitors AM should be aware of. Client usually knows these best.

fields.label: Review Profile Links
fields.placeholder: Google, Yelp, Facebook, or other review profile URLs…
fields.description: Links to review profiles — client needs to confirm ownership and provide links.

fields.label: Preferred Kickoff Call Availability
fields.description: Client's available time slots for the kickoff call. Send to client unless already scheduled.

fields.label: Accounts & Login Access
fields.placeholder: Access credentials or invitations to: Google Business Profile, ad accounts, website CMS, analytics…
fields.description: Platform credentials only the client can provide. This field should almost always be sent to the client.

fields.label: Brand Kit
fields.placeholder: Logo files (SVG/PNG), hex colors, fonts, brand guidelines…
fields.description: Logo, brand colors, fonts, and usage guidelines. Client asset — send to client.

fields.label: Onboarding Notes
fields.placeholder: Notes from kickoff call, initial observations, client preferences…
fields.description: Internal AM notes — not visible to the client.

fields.label: Special Instructions
fields.placeholder: Flags, constraints, sensitivities, or delivery notes for the team…
fields.description: Flags or constraints for the delivery team. Internal only.
